name: Albert Chen
title: Software Engineering Student / AI Agent & Automation Builder
motto: Focused on AI agents, workflow automation, and applied AI products.

hero.eyebrow: AI Agent Engineer · Workflow Builder · Software Engineer
hero.roleLine: AI Agent Builder | Workflow Automation | Productized AI
hero.summary: I design practical AI workflows and software systems that turn large-model capability into tools people can actually use.

about.title: About
about.p1: I am Albert Chen, a Software Engineering student at South China Normal University, currently focused on AI agents, workflow automation, and data-driven AI applications. My recent work centers on combining large models, agent frameworks, and business processes into tools that deliver real efficiency gains.
about.p2: I have internship experience at ByteDance and EVE Energy, where I worked on agent workflow design, RPA plus AI automation, and data-centric applications. I also built research and modeling projects, and I want to keep growing in agent development, applied AI engineering, and intelligent process automation.

items.title: ByteDance · AI Data & Safety
description: Worked on data-efficiency tasks for text LLM search scenarios, using a toolchain that includes Python, agents, LangGraph, OpenClaw, Codex, and Trae.
Built and iterated on automation pipelines, designing agent workflows to handle complex data tasks with better efficiency and delivery stability.

items.title: EVE Energy · Digital Economy Dept.
description: Developed RPA plus AI workflows for large-scale enterprise information retrieval on platforms such as Dow Jones, combining ShadowBot RPA with Python-based AI modules for automated querying, cleaning, and structuring.

Converted labor-intensive business tasks into fully automated workflows, reducing single-task turnaround from person-day scale to hour scale while reaching 95% information-processing accuracy and earning written recognition from the business team.

Contributed to AI agent and workflow development on Coze and Doubao-based platforms, building agents for intelligent news screening through prompt design and workflow orchestration, reducing processing time from day scale to minute scale.

items.name: DataAgent - Data Analysis and Visualization Agent
items.description: Built a data analysis and visualization agent for non-technical users, supporting natural-language interaction, requirement understanding, task decomposition, and analysis execution. The project is built around LangChain and connects FastAPI, React, and ECharts into a full pipeline covering file upload, preprocessing, analysis, chart generation, and result export, with a Plan-and-Execute mechanism that calls tools such as Pandas and Matplotlib for complex tasks.

items.name: National Mathematical Modeling Competition (H Prize)
items.description: As team leader, built an optimization model for agricultural planting decisions. I used Python (pandas) and Excel to create the data workflow, then built a mixed-integer programming model with PuLP under multiple land constraints and delivered an award-winning solution in the national competition.

items.topic: Deep Learning-Assisted EEG Diagnosis System for Alzheimer's Disease
description: Built an EEG analysis workflow for Alzheimer's disease prediction with a hybrid CNN-Transformer-MLP model to improve prediction accuracy.
Handled data cleaning, sequencing, and front-end development, leading the processing pipeline from raw EEG data to analysis-ready datasets with EEGLab (Matlab) and MNE-Python.
Delivered the front-end interface within one week using HBuilderX and native HTML, CSS, and JavaScript, enabling real-time data rendering and interaction feedback.

The project reached 83.5% accuracy on the validation set and 99.77% on the test set, and the results later supported a provincial innovation project extending the model to additional disease prediction scenarios.

items.courses: Relevant coursework: Object-Oriented Programming in Python, Software System Design, and Algorithm Design.
items.language: Language: CET-4 and CET-6, with strong technical reading and writing ability for English documentation.
